reviews.review_description: This has to be one of the best Gorilla Tag inspired games. There are just so many cool features in the game, good graphics, and u basically never get bored of it!! I got to meet the owner himself one time and he was so friendly and funny, but he also monitors players thoroughly to keep the game and the players safe. This game is definitely a 10/10!! And no, I’m not an npc or a fake acc.
